description: FreeTV is a streaming service website/app for watching free TV channels, movies, shows, and news online. Its published OpenAPI documents describe public endpoints for retrieving content listings such as shows, movies, channels, and news.
summary: FreeTV exposes two public HTTP/OpenAPI surfaces with no documented authentication: its main content API at `https://api.freetv-app.com` and a curated News Plugin API spec mirrored by APIs.guru at `https://staging2.freetv-app.com`.
